psalm-77-1.verse: My voice rises to God, and I will cry aloud; My voice rises to God, and He will hear me.
psalm-77-1.prayer: Lord, I cry aloud to You, trusting that You hear me. Help me bring every fear, burden, and question honestly before You.

psalm-77-2.verse: In the day of my trouble I sought the Lord; In the night my hand was stretched out without weariness; My soul refused to be comforted.
psalm-77-2.prayer: Father, when I am in distress, teach me to seek You first. Comfort my heart when my soul feels weary and troubled.

psalm-77-3.verse: When I remember God, then I am disturbed; When I sigh, then my spirit grows faint. Selah.
psalm-77-3.prayer: Lord, when remembering my struggles makes me restless, steady my spirit and help me rest in Your presence.

psalm-77-4.verse: You have held my eyelids open; I am so troubled that I cannot speak.
psalm-77-4.prayer: Father, when I cannot sleep or find words to pray, remain near to me and quiet my anxious thoughts.

psalm-77-5.verse: I have considered the days of old, The years of long ago.
psalm-77-5.prayer: Lord, help me remember the days of Your faithfulness. Let past testimonies strengthen my trust in You today.

psalm-77-6.verse: I will remember my song in the night; I will meditate with my heart, And my spirit ponders:
psalm-77-6.prayer: Father, when I search my heart in the night, guide my thoughts toward Your truth, mercy, and unfailing love.

psalm-77-7.verse: Will the Lord reject forever? And will He never be favorable again?
psalm-77-7.prayer: Lord, when I wonder whether You have forgotten me, remind me that Your love is steadfast and Your presence remains near.

psalm-77-8.verse: Has His lovingkindness ceased forever? Has His promise come to an end forever?
psalm-77-8.prayer: Father, when doubts rise within me, help me remember that Your lovingkindness has not ended and Your promises have not failed.

psalm-77-9.verse: Has God forgotten to be gracious, Or has He in anger withdrawn His compassion? Selah.
psalm-77-9.prayer: Lord, when my pain makes it hard to see Your mercy, open my eyes again to Your compassion and faithfulness.

psalm-77-10.verse: Then I said, “It is my grief, That the right hand of the Most High has changed.”
psalm-77-10.prayer: Father, when my heart feels weak, help me turn my thoughts toward Your power and the works of Your mighty hand.

psalm-77-11.verse: I shall remember the deeds of the Lord; Surely I will remember Your wonders of old.
psalm-77-11.prayer: Lord, I will remember Your deeds. Help me recall Your wonders and trust that You are still working in my life.

psalm-77-12.verse: I will meditate on all Your work And muse on Your deeds.
psalm-77-12.prayer: Father, teach me to meditate on all You have done and consider Your works with gratitude, faith, and reverence.

psalm-77-13.verse: Your way, O God, is holy; What god is great like our God?
psalm-77-13.prayer: Lord, Your way is holy. Help me trust Your character and remember that there is no god as great as You.

psalm-77-14.verse: You are the God who works wonders; You have made known Your strength among the peoples.
psalm-77-14.prayer: Father, You are the God who works wonders. Show Your strength in my life and help me trust Your power.

psalm-77-15.verse: You have by Your power redeemed Your people, The sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah.
psalm-77-15.prayer: Lord, thank You for redeeming Your people. Remind me that Your salvation is greater than every fear and trouble I face.

psalm-77-16.verse: The waters saw You, O God; The waters saw You, they were in anguish; The deeps also trembled.
psalm-77-16.prayer: Father, creation responds to Your power. Help me stand in awe of Your greatness and trust Your authority over every storm.

psalm-77-17.verse: The clouds poured out water; The skies gave forth a sound; Your arrows flashed here and there.
psalm-77-17.prayer: Lord, when life feels like thunder, rain, and lightning around me, help me remember that You remain sovereign over all things.

psalm-77-18.verse: The sound of Your thunder was in the whirlwind; The lightnings lit up the world; The earth trembled and shook.
psalm-77-18.prayer: Father, Your voice is powerful and Your presence shakes creation. Help me listen with reverence and follow You with trust.

psalm-77-19.verse: Your way was in the sea And Your paths in the mighty waters, And Your footprints may not be known.
psalm-77-19.prayer: Lord, even when Your path is hidden and I cannot see Your footprints, help me trust that You are leading me faithfully.

psalm-77-20.verse: You led Your people like a flock By the hand of Moses and Aaron.
psalm-77-20.prayer: Father, thank You for shepherding Your people with care. Lead me gently, guide me wisely, and keep me close to You.

psalm-77-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for hearing me when I cry out and for remaining faithful when my heart feels troubled. Help me remember Your works, trust Your promises, and meditate on Your goodness in every season. When Your path is hard to see, remind me that You are still guiding me as a faithful Shepherd. Strengthen my faith, quiet my fears, and keep my heart anchored in Your holy and unfailing love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-77-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing me when I cry out and for remaining faithful when my heart feels troubled. Help me remember Your works, trust Your promises, and meditate on Your goodness in every season. When Your path is hard to see, remind me that You are still guiding me as a faithful Shepherd. Strengthen my faith, quiet my fears, and keep my heart anchored in Your holy and unfailing love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
